name: Dungeonfell
short_description: Step into Dungeonfell – a single-player tactical, turn-based, Roguelite – where you command a group of Delvers in their quest to save Dungeonfell. Battle through the Dungeon, taking on waves of Monsters, and collecting valuable treasure to upgrade your Delvers.
detailed_description:
Step into Dungeonfell – a single-player tactical, turn-based, Roguelite – where you command a group of Delvers in their quest to save Dungeonfell. Battle through the Dungeon, taking on waves of Monsters, and collecting valuable treasure to upgrade your Delvers.

The Prophecy of the Dark Star is coming to pass… The lands of Dungeonfell are being consumed by the corruption, tainting the Dungeon and twisting the Monsters inside. The Great Wizard Balthazar calls any willing Delvers to help in his quest to find the fabled Keystones, kept by the Dungeon’s guardians, and said to hold the secret to stopping the spreading corruption.

Learn the unique abilities of each Delver, unlock new spells, and gather Relics to make your Delvers even stronger. Combine your Delvers strategically to create powerful synergies and overcome the dangers of the Dungeon’s depths.

Gameplay

• Uncover the truth of the Ancient Sage’s prophecy.

• Assemble your team from a roster of unique Delvers.

• Fight through each layer of the Dungeon, taking on monsters in tactical battles.

• Choose your route through, focusing on different difficulties and rewards.

• Spend hard earned Gold to unlock new Delvers and progress through their skill tree.

• Post your top scores on global leaderboards

Dungeonfell has endless replayability. Each run is different, and knowledge is key if you want to master the ever-evolving tactical depth. Battle for glory as you work to cleanse the corruption at the heart of the dungeons. 

Dungeon Mastery

• Complete Dungeons and unlock ever more difficult Corruption levels to test your abilities.

• Learn each Delver’s strengths and weaknesses, explore every team composition, and find your play style.

• Master the Celestial Tablet: use it to unlock skills, abilities, relics, and more!
